## Changes

## Public Repo Hygiene

- [ ] No private data, raw transcripts, credentials, local outputs, or
      machine-specific paths are included.
- [ ] Raw PDFs, screenshots, and unpublished source artifacts remain ignored or
      were explicitly approved for tracking.
- [ ] Ecological claims are evidence-backed or marked `Unknown`/blank according
      to the data standard.
- [ ] Excluded sources were not introduced.

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m ruff check .`
- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] `sphinx-build -b html docs _build/html -W`
- [ ] `python -m build`
- [ ] `twine check dist/*`

## Documentation And Closeout

- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` updated.
- [ ] `CHANGE_LOG.md` updated.
- [ ] Issue checklists/comments updated.
- [ ] Deferred work is explicit.
